title: Opposition
summary: The single most important endgame concept

steps.title: Face to Face
steps.text: Two kings face each other with one square between them. The side NOT to move has the opposition — the other king must step aside. In king-and-pawn endings, having the opposition often decides the game.

steps.title: With a Pawn
steps.text: Here White has an extra pawn and wants to promote it. To win, White's king must PRECEDE the pawn with the opposition. The rule: 'king in front, pawn behind.'

steps.hint: Kd6 or Kf6 both claim the opposition and win.
